title: Die With Zero
subtitle: Getting All You Can from Your Money and Your Life
author: Bill Perkins
themes: Maximize life experiences, not net worth
Invest in experiences early when you can enjoy them
The fulfillment curve and memory dividends
Time bucketing to align spending with life stages
Dying with zero as the optimal financial outcome
excerpt: The Die With Zero philosophy: once you have saved enough to fund your retirement and give to family and charity, start focusing on generating memorable life experiences. Stop delaying living.
